name: vibe-framework
paperTitle: VIBE: A Versatile, Interpretable Behavior-aware Agent Evaluation Framework
content:
## Introduction

Multi-dimensional evaluation reveals agent strengths/weaknesses; interpretable metrics identify specific failure modes. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Multi-dimensional evaluation reveals agent strengths/weaknesses; interpretable metrics identify specific failure modes.

```
  │   └─ Main computation
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 2]
  │   └─ Refinement
  │
  └─→ Output
```
